description: Composition:Green cotton shoulder patch tee with loud brandingWash Care:Hand wash or machine washFitting:Comfort FitThis aqua green tee with prominent branding on the chest is that perfect wear for puma fans.  The purple stripe detailing and logo complement the overall design of the tee.
